name: Garbanzo Nuts
recipeIngredient: Any other seasonings you may want...
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a single layer on a nonstick baking pan.
2. While still damp, sprinkle the beans with the seasonings.
3. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven for about 45 minutes, or until the beans are quite dry and browned.
4. Use a spatula to loosen the beans from the pan periodically during the baking period and turn them a few times.
This makes over 5 cups.
